criteria_results.title: Hargrove & Tilton Review: Failure to Test Trade Allocation Noted
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output mentions the Hargrove & Tilton compliance review in several places, but never specifically notes that the December 8, 2023 review failed to test trade allocation patterns despite the firm's heavy reliance on omnibus trading. The output references H&T's finding that WCA's Code of Ethics and personal trading policies were 'generally adequate' and notes minor procedural deficiencies, and mentions that H&T's sample review did not include trade allocation documentation. However, it does not specifically identify the Hargrove & Tilton review's omission of trade allocation pattern testing as relevant evidence of WCA's deficient compliance infrastructure in the manner required by the criterion.

criteria_results.title: Key Dates: Examination Timeline Accurately Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output only mentions two of the five required dates: the examination commenced March 11, 2024, and the deficiency letter was issued August 2, 2024. The referral to Enforcement on October 18, 2024, the referral notice dated November 6, 2024, and the service date of November 12, 2024 are not mentioned anywhere in the output. The criterion requires at least three of the five dates to be correctly stated, but only two are present.

criteria_results.title: Whitmore's 12% LP Interest Value Correctly Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output does not mention Whitmore's 12% limited partnership interest in Oceanic Fund I LP or its valuation of approximately $22.2 million (12% × $185M) anywhere in the document. The output references Oceanic Fund I LP's net assets of approximately $58 million (not $185M, which is Whitmore Strategic Credit Fund LP's net assets), but never calculates or states a $22.2 million value for any 12% LP interest.

criteria_results.title: Compliance Manual Last Updated November 15, 2022
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output explicitly mentions 'The last revised date for WCA's Compliance Manual is November 15, 2022' in the 'Failure to Maintain Required Books and Records' section.

criteria_results.title: Lakeshore Trading LLC: Ostrowski's 40% Ownership Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output explicitly states in the 'Breach of Fiduciary Duty / Directed Brokerage Arrangement' section that 'Bellini...breached his fiduciary duty by directing trades to Lakeshore Trading LLC, a broker-dealer in which Kevin Ostrowski held a significant 40% ownership interest.' This correctly identifies both Ostrowski's identity and his 40% ownership stake in Lakeshore Trading LLC.

criteria_results.title: Lakeshore Trading LLC: Ostrowski-Bellini Personal Relationship and Undisclosed Nature
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output mentions that Bellini had a personal relationship with Ostrowski and that this relationship was undisclosed, but it never identifies Ostrowski as Bellini's college roommate. The criterion specifically requires that the output identify Ostrowski as Bellini's college roommate. Since this specific detail is absent from the output, the criterion is not satisfied.

criteria_results.title: Email Exhibit Language Quoted or Paraphrased
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output does not reference the Whitmore-to-Delgado email (whitmore-delgado-email.eml) at all, nor does it mention the ambiguous language 'clean up the shared drive' or 'clean up of legacy files on the shared drive.' While the output discusses Whitmore's alleged deletion of trade allocation records during the examination, it does not cite or paraphrase this specific email exhibit or note its potentially innocent interpretation.
